title: Viking Therapeutics, Inc. (VKTX) Stock Price, News, Quote & History - Yahoo Finance
text: Yahoo Finance page for VKTX Viking Therapeutics stock. Provides real-time stock price quotes, historical price charts, company information, and news feed. Includes links to earnings dates, analyst ratings, fundamental financial data, and recent news articles about the company. Shows current stock performance relative to sector and market indices. Useful for monitoring stock price movements around earnings announcements and clinical trial results.
